name: core_cli_driver
description: Cross-platform Python driver for the SCMessenger CLI daemon. Start/stop nodes, query identity/contacts, send mesh messages, and inspect daemon logs. Output is machine-readable JSON.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Launch the CLI daemon in the background, redirect output to tmp/daemon.log, write PID to tmp/daemon.pid

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Kill the daemon via OS-appropriate mechanism (taskkill on Windows, kill -9 on Unix), delete PID file

commands.name: status
commands.description: Check whether the daemon is running by verifying process liveness

commands.name: identity
commands.description: Run 'scm identity show' and return node identity as JSON

commands.name: send
commands.description: Send a message through the live daemon to a peer

commands.name: daemon-log
commands.description: Tail N lines from tmp/daemon.log (default 100). Cross-platform.
